name: Tomato Sauce (Finsand)
recipeIngredient: Firm red tomatoes (or canned tomatoes without seasonings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the tomatoes.
2. Place in a large kettle.
3. Push down with hands or back of spoon to render some juice.
4. Bake at 325°F until soft pulp remains.
5. Spoon into blender.
6. Blend until smooth.
7. Seal in sterilized jars or freeze.
- NOTE: Freeze in an ice cube tray. I think 2 cubes is about 1/4 cup.
